data.body: KEY LEARNING (workflow-critical): plan-review attestations are UNSCOPED and pinned to the code git HEAD sha at review time. Any code COMMIT advances HEAD and stales EVERY un-claimed leaf's attestation ('attestation is stale (unscoped; signed at <old>, HEAD is <new>)'). This is precisely the drift a37b/a8e5 fix. Claims themselves touch the tickets branch, NOT the code HEAD. => CORRECTED STRATEGY: claim ALL leaves first at a stable HEAD, THEN implement+commit the whole stack (post-claim HEAD moves are harmless). ac0e already committed at HEAD 0fb8d17e6 (staled the pre-reviewed batch). Re-reviewing all remaining leaves at 0fb8d17e6 and claiming before any further commit.
